title: NeonDeco
description: A little Decorative Mod with Neon-Styled Blocks
body:
![NeonDeco Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf6f73660df44f2457ad5eb4ce19a49d851de8ea.png)


### **This Mod focuses on adding new Neon-Styled Blocks to Minecraft**

This Mod contains **61 New Blocks (Including all Color Variations over 385 Blocks)** and **Crafting Recipes** for each of them

All Blocks now have 6 new color variations, containing Lime, Lightblue, Magenta, Yellow, Orange and Red

All Blocks can be painted in desired color by right-clicking with supported dyes

All Blocks are Shader Compatible

New Version 1.2.0.a (Alpha) available now!
#
**I am currently Re-Working this Mod for better Develpoment!**
#

## Future Features

- More Tube Blocks for more Details
- More Sign and Symbol Blocks
- More Vanilla Based Neon Blocks
## 

You´re very welcome to give me Feedback about current Features or to share your own Ideas for Future Updates of this Mod on the official Discord Server :)

Please Note that I´m a Newbie in Minecraft Modding 

Thank You :)
